An Auspicious Celebration Awaits

Diksha ❤️ Sourav

Two hearts, one destiny —
as the universe conspired,
love wrote their story in stars.

26 – 27 April 2026 · Nigha, West Bengal
With Joy & Blessings

You Are Warmly Invited

With hearts overflowing with gratitude and souls brimming with joy,
we joyfully announce the union of Diksha and Sourav —
two souls who found in each other a home, a dream, and forever.

As two families become one, and two hearts weave their story into eternity,
we humbly seek your blessings, your laughter, and your love
to grace this beautiful beginning.

& Smt. Jyoti Devi
